info.name: RealtyDoor API v1.0
info.description: RealtyDoor platform API — Indian real estate lead-gen. Base URL: http://localhost:5000. Set authToken variable to your Clerk JWT.

variable.description: Update from seed output — slugs include Date.now()
From seed output — run: npm run db:seed
From seed output — run: npm run db:seed
From seed output — run: npm run db:seed

response.name: 200 – Property Detail
response.body: {"success":true,"data":{"id":"664abc123def456789012345","title":"3 BHK Flat in Baner","slug":"skyline-heights-3bhk-baner-1717000000000","description":"Spacious 3 BHK apartment in the heart of Baner with premium amenities, ample parking, and excellent connectivity to Hinjewadi IT Park.","price":8500000,"propertyType":"FLAT","listingType":"SALE","propertyStatus":"READY_TO_MOVE","publishStatus":"APPROVED","bhk":3,"bathrooms":2,"carpetArea":1200,"builtUpArea":1450,"floorNumber":4,"totalFloors":12,"furnishing":"Semi-Furnished","facing":"East","address":"Skyline Heights, Plot 12, Baner Road","locality":"Baner","city":"Pune","state":"Maharashtra","pincode":"411045","latitude":18.5596,"longitude":73.7769,"nearbyLandmarks":["D-Mart Baner","Orchid School","Baner Metro Station"],"isVerified":true,"reraNumber":"P52100012345","bankApprovals":["SBI","HDFC","ICICI"],"images":["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580587771525-78b9dba3b914?w=800"],"amenities":["Gymnasium","Swimming Pool","24x7 Security","CCTV","Power Backup"],"partner":{"companyName":"RealtyPro Solutions","partnerSubType":"AGENT"},"createdAt":"2026-05-01T10:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-05-10T08:30:00.000Z"}}

formdata.description: jpg/png/webp, max 10MB each, up to 10 files

body.raw:
{
  "propertyId": "{{propertyId}}",
  "buyerName": "Suresh Mehta",
  "buyerEmail": "user@realtydoor.com",
  "buyerPhone": "+919000000003",
  "buyerMessage": "I am interested in this property. Can we schedule a visit this weekend?"
}

response.name: 200 – Lead Detail
response.body: {"success":true,"data":{"id":"665def456abc789012345678","buyerName":"Suresh Mehta","buyerEmail":"user@realtydoor.com","buyerPhone":"+91 90000 XXXXX","buyerMessage":"I am interested in this property.","status":"ASSIGNED","isOtpVerified":false,"siteVisitScheduledAt":null,"visitNotes":null,"property":{"id":"664abc123def456789012345","title":"3 BHK Flat in Baner","slug":"skyline-heights-3bhk-baner-1717000000000","locality":"Baner","city":"Pune","price":8500000},"createdAt":"2026-05-19T11:30:00.000Z"}}

response.name: 200 – Visit Scheduled
response.body: {"success":true,"data":{"message":"OTP sent to buyer via WhatsApp. Enter it at the site."}}

response.name: 400 – Lead Already Closed
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Cannot schedule visit on a closed lead"}

formdata.value: Buyer liked the property. Wants to negotiate on price.
Buyer is pre-approved for home loan from HDFC.

response.name: 200 – Documents Uploaded
response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Documentation uploaded","data":{"id":"665def456abc789012345678","visitPhotoUrls":["https://res.cloudinary.com/realtydoor/image/upload/v1/realtydoor/tickets/visit1.jpg"],"closureDocumentUrls":[],"visitNotes":"Buyer liked the property. Wants to negotiate on price."}}

response.name: 200 – Lead Closed
response.body: {"success":true,"data":{"message":"Lead marked as closed. Admin will review escrow release."}}

response.name: 400 – No Escrow
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Escrow payment required before closing a deal"}

response.name: 200 – User Inquiries
response.body: {"success":true,"data":[{"id":"665def456abc789012345678","status":"SITE_VISIT_DONE","buyerMessage":"I am interested in this property.","property":{"title":"3 BHK Flat in Baner","slug":"skyline-heights-3bhk-baner-1717000000000","city":"Pune","images":["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580587771525-78b9dba3b914?w=800"]},"createdAt":"2026-05-10T10:00:00.000Z"}]}

response.name: 403 – Phone Not Verified
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Phone number must be verified before applying for a loan"}

formdata.description: RERA certificate, Aadhar, Business PAN — jpg/png/pdf, max 10MB, up to 5 files

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"KYC submitted for review. Usually verified within 24 hours.","data":{"kycStatus":"PENDING_REVIEW","kycDocumentUrls":["https://res.cloudinary.com/realtydoor/image/upload/v1/realtydoor/kyc/rera_cert.pdf"]}}

item.name: Auth
item.description: Login sync and profile endpoints. Call POST /sync after every Clerk login from the frontend.

request.description: Call this on every login from Next.js. Verifies the Clerk JWT, fetches the full Clerk profile (name, email, phone, avatar), upserts the MongoDB record, and returns the full profile. Also stamps publicMetadata.role in Clerk if missing.

response.name: 200 – Partner Synced
response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Success","data":{"id":"6a1a3213aa8de854e8acfad7","clerkId":"user_seed_partner_001","name":"Rajdeep Kumar","email":"partner@realtydoor.com","phone":"+919000000002","phoneVerified":true,"role":"PARTNER","isNRI":false,"profileImageUrl":null,"partnerSubType":"AGENT","companyName":"RealtyPro Solutions","bio":"10 years of experience in Pune real estate market.","websiteUrl":"https://realtypro.in","kycStatus":"VERIFIED","kycVerifiedAt":"2026-05-01T08:00:00.000Z","kycRejectionNote":null,"createdAt":"2026-05-01T08:00:00.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-05-01T08:00:00.000Z"}}

request.description: Self-service upgrade from USER to PARTNER. Only PARTNER can be self-assigned. Idempotent — if already PARTNER or ADMIN, returns current role.
Returns the full DB profile for the authenticated user including unread notification count and active subscription. Works for all roles (USER, PARTNER, ADMIN).
